title: Airline Distribution Systems Review: 2026 Best Tools for Ticket Sales
description: In-depth review of top airline distribution systems including Amadeus Distribution, Sabre GDS, TravelSky Distribution, comparing GDS connectivity, direct s
content:
Airline Distribution System Core

Airline distribution is the core of ticket sales, with distribution channels (GDS, OTA, airline websites) covering 90% of ticket sales. Distribution costs (GDS fees, OTA commissions) account for 3%-5% of ticket revenue. Airline distribution systems are core tools for GDS connectivity, direct sales platforms, distribution channel management, and NDC support.

Distribution System Pain Points

Airline distribution faces five major challenges: GDS costs, GDS fees are high ($3-$5 per ticket), creatg significant distribution cost pressure; direct sales improvement, increasing direct sales share is difficult, website conversion rates are low; channel management, distribution channels (GDS, OTA, agents) are scattered, channel coordination difficult; NDC transformation, NDC (IATA New Distribution Capability) transformation difficult, significant technology investment required; data integration, distribution data (sales, inventory) dispersed, analysis difficult.

Distribution System Value

Airlines deploying distribution management systems achieve on average: distribution cost reduction of 10%-15%, GDS fees optimized; direct sales share increase from 20% to 35%; channel management automation, channel coordination efficiency improved; NDC transformation support, NDC technology support complete; distribution data analysis, sales data integrated for analysis. Distribution management systems are sales core.

Top Airline Distribution Systems Review

Amadeus Distribution System

Distribution Leader

Amadeus is the airline distribution leader, with largest GDS market share globally. Core advantages are global GDS coverage, complete direct sales platform, and leading NDC support.

Core Functional Modules

GDS Connectivity: Amadeus GDS connectivity, global travel agencies and OTA connections. GDS covers globally, widest distribution channels. GDS fee management, fee tracking and optimization.

Direct Sales Platform: Airline website sales platform, website booking, payment, and service. Direct sales conversion rate optimization, website optimization recommendations. Direct sales share improvement. Direct sales cost reduction.

Distribution Channel Management: Distribution channel management, GDS, OTA, agent channel coordination. Channel inventory allocation, inventory dynamic allocation. Channel pricing management, channel differentiated pricing. Channel performance tracking, channel sales comparison.

NDC Support: NDC technology support, Amadeus NDC platform leading. NDC API open, OTA NDC integration. NDC direct sales, NDC direct sales share increase. NDC product rich, ancillary services NDC distribution.

Distribution Data Analysis: Distribution sales data integration, sales and inventory data. Sales analysis, channel and route sales analysis. Sales prediction, sales trend forecasting.

Technical Architecture

Cloud platform, native integration with Altéa PSS. Distribution API open. Mobile direct sales platform. Distribution dashboard.

Success Cases

Lufthansa adopting Amadeus distribution increased direct sales share from 22% to 38%, reduced distribution costs by 12%, and achieved 15% NDC direct sales share. Annual distribution cost savings $20 million. Distribution leader delivers excellent results.

Pricing Strategy

GDS fees: $3-$5 per ticket (travel agency booking). Direct sales platform annual fee: Major airlines $2 million-$3 million. NDC platform annual fee: $1 million-$1.5 million. Distribution excellent cost-performance.

Sabre GDS Distribution

GDS Professional Solution

Sabre GDS is a GDS professional solution, largest US market share. Core advantages are US GDS coverage and complete distribution channels.

Functional Features

GDS Connectivity: Sabre GDS connectivity, US travel agencies and OTA coverage. GDS fee management.

Direct Sales Platform: Airline website sales platform.

Distribution Channel Management: Channel management, channel coordination.

NDC Support: NDC technology support.

Pricing Model

GDS fees: $3-$4 per ticket. Direct sales platform annual fee: Major airlines $1.8 million-$2.5 million. Excellent US market cost-performance.

TravelSky Distribution System

Localized Distribution Solution

TravelSky distribution is a localized solution, serving Air China, China Eastern, China Southern and others. Core advantages are domestic distribution coverage and localized adaptation.

Localized Functions

GDS Connectivity: Domestic GDS connectivity, domestic travel agencies and OTA coverage.

Direct Sales Platform: Airline website sales platform, WeChat mini-program direct sales.

Distribution Channels: Domestic channel management.

NDC Support: NDC technology support.

Pricing Advantages

GDS fees: RMB 15-25 per ticket. Direct sales platform annual fee: Major airlines RMB 2 million-3 million. Excellent domestic distribution cost-performance.

Trip.com Distribution Platform

OTA Distribution Solution

Trip.com distribution platform is an OTA distribution solution, airline and OTA distribution integration. Core advantages are global OTA coverage and high OTA conversion rates.

Core Functions

OTA Connectivity: Trip.com OTA connectivity, global passenger coverage.

Distribution Management: OTA distribution management, inventory allocation and pricing.

Pricing Strategy

OTA commission: 3%-5% per ticket. Excellent OTA distribution cost-performance.

Selection Decision Framework

Requirements Matching Principles

Distribution system selection needs tos to consider six factors: core requirements (comprehensive distribution Amadeus); GDS coverage (global coverage Amadeus, US coverage Sabre); market region (Chinese market TravelSky); NDC transformation (NDC support Amadeus); direct sales improvement (complete direct sales platform Amadeus/Sabre); budget constraints (high budget Amadeus, medium budget Sabre/TravelSky, commission model Trip.com).

Implementation Success Factors

Channel Integration: Distribution channel integration is key, allow 2-3 months.

Direct Sales Optimization: Website direct sales optimization, website conversion rate improvement.

NDC Deployment: NDC technology deployment, OTA NDC integration.

Continuous Evaluation: Distribution system continuous evaluation, direct sales share and distribution cost tracking.

2026 Distribution Trends

NDC Mainstream

In 2026, NDC becomes distribution mainstream, NDC direct sales share breaks through 30%. NDC products rich, ancillary services NDC distribution. NDC reduces distribution costs.

Direct Sales Dominant

Direct sales becomes distribution dominant, airline direct sales share breaks through 50%. Website and app direct sales platform optimized. Direct sales reduces distribution costs.

AI Pricing

AI distribution pricing, channel and passenger AI input, differentiated pricing optimized. AI pricing improves revenue.

OTA Collaboration

OTA collaborative distribution, airline and OTA deep cooperation, OTA customized product distribution. OTA collaboration improves sales.

Social Media Distribution

Social media distribution, WeChat, TikTok, Xiaohongshu ticket sales. Social media distribution expands channels.

Summary Recommendations

Airline distribution system selection needs tos to match core requirements, GDS coverage, and market region. Amadeus distribution leader comprehensive; Sabre GDS professional US coverage; TravelSky localized distribution; Trip.com OTA distribution. Implementation success depends on channel integration, direct sales optimization, NDC deployment, and continuous evaluation. In 2026, NDC mainstream, direct sales dominant, AI pricing, OTA collaboration, and social distribution will reshape distribution landscape.
author: Airline Distribution Research Team
